scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const s=p.join('node_modules','monaco-editor','min','vs'),d=p.join('apps','web','public','vs');if(fs.existsSync(s)&&!fs.existsSync(d)){fs.cpSync(s,d,{recursive:true});console.log('Monaco files copied to apps/web/public/vs')}"
